### Functions

- `list_tasks()`: (no docstring)
- `tasks_for_process(process_id)`: All tasks materialized for one process · one row per task.
- `task_for_process(process_id, task_id)`: (no docstring)
- `journey_flow(process_id)`: Horizontal journey-flow per operator brief · ordered phase progression.
- `_deterministic_sample_rows(task_id, n)`: Per §57.7 scaffold · 10 deterministic insurance-themed sample rows.
- `run_task(process_id, task_id)`: Trigger a per-task run · returns run_id + status + sample rows.
- `list_recent_runs(limit)`: (no docstring)
